top_items.title: Anthropic just shipped an OpenClaw killer called Claude Code Channels, letting you message it over Telegram and Discord - VentureBeat
top_items.one_liner: Anthropic's Claude Code Channels allow messaging via Telegram and Discord, positioning it as a strong competitor to existing tools.

top_items.title: Apple Spent 16 Years Saying No. The Touchscreen Mac Is Finally Here
top_items.one_liner: Apple finally introduces a touchscreen Mac after years of skepticism about the concept.
